title: Stop Prompting Claude. Start Loop Engineering.
summary: Loop Engineering (or Agentic Engineering) is a technique where developers build iterative loops with AI agents instead of relying on single-prompt interactions. The approach requires five building blocks: trigger, execution skills, goal and verification, and output and memory, enabling AI systems to autonomously work toward objectives.
